title: Package directory layout
implementation_summary: Added CONTROL_PLANE_DOMAIN_MODEL_CLOSEOUT_HANDOFF_REQUIRED_SUBPHASES with 51 completed RP00.P01 Domain Model prerequisite subphases through RP00.P01.M09.S03.
Added CONTROL_PLANE_DOMAIN_MODEL_CLOSEOUT_HANDOFF_LAYOUT for the metadata-only P01 closeout handoff.

Added assertControlPlaneDomainModelCloseoutHandoffLayout to fail closed on missing prerequisites, service-logic creation claims, product-state writes, entity-registry mutation, or wrong next boundary.
Exposed the handoff layout through CONTROL_PLANE_DOMAIN_MODEL_REGISTRY and advanced the next boundary to RP00.P02.M00.S01.
Recorded the synthetic control_plane_domain_model_closeout_handoff fixture with non-UI gate applicability and no-write/no-real-data boundaries.
Updated the contract validator, model tests, fixture smoke tests, README, and control-plane contract for RP00.P01.M10.S01.
